desc: Finalize the SMP/broken_wfi/MPIDR + cpufreq upstream drafts in done/; checkpatch; ready for CJ to post. Update 2026-07-14 (fable): reframe the broken_wfi notes around Sven Peter's c22ca847 (in our main via fork base; not yet AsahiLinux main) — CYC_OVRD_DISABLE_WFI_RET left set makes WFI drop the register file and re-enter at RVBAR, i.e. the mechanism behind our observation; his fix clears it via SYS_IMP_APL_CYC_OVRD under apple_sysregs_unlocked, a no-op on raw-boot T6040 (=False confirmed live), so WFE park remains required on locked-sysreg machines and the draft should say exactly that. Also cite yuka 2e6ac0b0 (CYC_OVRD not writable at EL1). Sven's 954f80c6 (mmu_secondary_setup dsb sy + stack-cache invalidate, upstream #463/#480) is also already in our main — relevant context for secondary bring-up claims
author: claude
